10565902.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
10565902.description: Rachel Uchitel's sex-affair of secret meetings and scandalous messages with Tiger Woods led her to become the face of Woods' career and marriage collapsing before the entire world.

10566851.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
10566851.description: Former teacher Mary Kay Letourneau had a sexual relationship with a student. After years in prison they married and had children, as the world continues to scorn their relationship.

10566997.title: Judge Judy
10566997.description: Ex-friends fight over a theft, and a nanny sues her former employers for nonpayment.

10567871.title: Cheaters
10567871.description: Just one month before the wedding, Ken is having second thoughts. Imagine the shock when he discovers that his fiancée is having an affair with his best man to be.

10568826.title: Cheaters
10568826.description: Love at first sight turns sour in this compelling episode. Chase's suspicions are confirmed by Cheaters: Megan is cheating and taking liberties.

10569017.title: Celebrity Damage Control
10569017.description: Nick Nolte's lifelong fondness for drugs and alcohol grew into a serious addiction, leading to a DUI arrest and a knock to his reputation and career.

10569946.title: Forensics NZ
10569946.description: Police try to determine whether a shooting was accidental, homicide or self-defence after a man turns himself in at Palmerston North Police Station claiming to have shot another man.

10570896.title: Judge Judy
10570896.description: A man says his ex broke into his room and destroyed his belongings after a rock hit him in the head. Former neighbours fight over garage-sale items.

10570987.title: Judge Judy
10570987.description: A landlord accuses a tenant of assault. Then, a defendant says the plaintiff's TV was stolen from her car.

10571850.title: Judge Judy
10571850.description: Feuding ex-lovers describe physical assault and destruction of property. Then, a twin makes excuses for pawning her sister's jewellery and denies owing for a loan.

10571949.title: Motorbike Cops
10571949.description: Join Britain's traffic cops on their daily jobs and get an inside look into what goes into policing the country's roads.

10572840.title: Motorbike Cops
10572840.description: Join Britain's traffic cops on their daily jobs and get an inside look into what goes into policing the country's roads.

10572925.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
10572925.description: They say, `you can't teach an old dog new tricks', but nobody has said anything about being unable to teach a bounty-hunting Dog new tricks. Which is good because after an eight-season run on A&E, Duane `Dog' Chapman brings his people-tracking skills to a new network, along with wife Beth and their son, Leland. But this time the Chapmans aren't searching for fugitives on their home turf of Hawaii. Instead, they travel to a different city each week and work with the local bondsman offices and bounty hunters, using their years of experience in the business to assist the local agents. The Chapmans motivate and inspire the local bounty hunters while training them how to use high-tech tracking devices and showing them new techniques they can use in finding fugitives.

10573862.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10573862.description: An experienced base jumper's parachute gets tangled up when he leaps off Beachy Head, passers-by come to the aid of a fitness trainer collapsed in the street, and a fire near a petrol station causes staff and customers to run for safety.

10573965.title: Operation Repo
10573965.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10574836.title: Operation Repo
10574836.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10574926.title: Paranormal Survivor
10574926.description: A woman claims to be tormented by apparitions. The story of a teen being attacked by a demonic beast. Rocky Primiani shares his story of encounters with the afterlife.

10575885.title: Judge Judy
10575885.description: A basement is allegedly turned into an underage nightclub. Unpaid rent is disputed by young tenants and their landlord.

10575948.title: Judge Judy
10575948.description: Judge Judy Sheindlin, a judge from New York, tackles real-life small claims cases with a no-nonsense attitude.

10577995.description: Mark Staudte abruptly became ill, experiencing seizures and his skin turning yellow. Within 48 hours, Mark died, and five months later, his son developed similar symptoms.

10586702.description: The Cheaters detectives are on hand to help Christina, who has noticed a change in boyfriend Robert's behaviour, and Rebecca, whose partner of four years has become distant.

10587680.title: Fame Kills
10587680.description: A girl from a small town heads to Hollywood hoping to make the leap from model to movie star, but after landing her first major role, she disappears without a trace.

10588408.title: Paranormal Survivor
10588408.description: The ghosts of prisoners make jailhouse ghost tours too scary; a woman is attacked by a spirit lurking in her historic home; renovations unleash ghosts protecting a centuries-old secret.
